feed.title: Toepper.Rocks!
feed.subtitle: Thoughts, ideas and solutions in tech like Avaya, Microsoft365, Unity, MS Teams...and a little bit of Kendo

entry.title: Avaya Calling for MS Teams
entry.summary: Avaya Calling for MS Teams Configuration in Avaya Spaces To use Avaya Calling for MS Teams you first need an Avaya Spaces Account. Therefore a admin should add the company under Manage Companies at https://accounts.avayacloud.com. Under the tab Domains you have to add and verify your company domain. The domain has to be the same used as the Microsoft 365 domain. The domain m...

entry.title: Handbook for Kendo Shiai and Shinpan Management

link.title: Handbook for Kendo Shiai and Shinpan Management

entry.summary: This is an online version of the freely available Handbook for Kendo Shiai and Shinpan Management. Copyright by the AJKF (All Japan Kendo Federation). Foreword A central focus of All Japan Kendo Federation (AJKF) activities since 2000 has been “Improving shinpan level in combination with comprehensive training to enhance the overall quality of kendo in Japan.” All sorts of situations can ...
